name: rl-demonstrations
description: Bootstrap RL from human demonstrations using imitation to warm-start policies, then refine with RL.
keywords: reinforcement learning, imitation learning, demonstrations, behavioral cloning, learning from humans
content:
## Reinforcement Learning from Demonstrations

Learning from demonstrations accelerates RL by providing good initial policies.

### Core Concept

Learning from demonstrations accelerates RL by providing good initial policies. This enables efficient model development and deployment.
